title: Dense Chinese Tofu Noodles
description: A comforting, lacto-vegetarian-friendly Cantonese dish featuring a dense, mustardy sauce and crunchy graham cracker crumbs, perfect for a sick day.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mustard, soy sauce, and cornstarch.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
Add the tofu to the skillet and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Add the mustard mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the graham cracker crumbs and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the sauce and tofu.
Transfer the noodles to a serving dish and top with chopped scallions.
